author: anon-a7c6025f
content: All 5 PyTorch subsystem analyses complete. Key findings: (1) Scalar libm exp vs SLEEF 8-wide = 8-16x gap, (2) Parallel threshold 2M vs 32K = 4x gap on medium tensors, (3) Transpose copies data instead of zero-copy stride swap, (4) GPU gradient accumulation roundtrips through CPU, (5) Optimizer state as Vec<f64> on CPU not GPU, (6) No vectorized loads in GPU kernels (1 elem/thread vs 8), (7) No fp16/Tensor Core support. Building design docs.
